---
title: "Teaching"
---

**Workshop Facilitator**

-   Graduate Assistant for Equity, Diversity, and Inclusion (Summer 2023): Organized and facilitated review sessions in methods and topics covered in the core curriculum for UCSD political science Ph.D. students

**Teaching Assistance**

University of California, San Diego

-   Introduction to International Relations (Summer 2022)

-   California Politics (Summer 2022

-   Voting Rights Act (Winter 2022)

-   Race & Law (Fall 2021)

University of Maryland

-   Domestic Politics of China (Spring 2021)

-   Scholarly Writing for the Humanities (Spring 2020-Fall 2021)
